parameters.content:
## Write and publish AI social media posts from trending topics with PostStack

### How it works
Every day this workflow picks a trending topic from an RSS feed (Google Trends by default), asks OpenAI to write a short post in your brand voice (strict JSON: caption + hashtags), then publishes it through [PostStack](https://poststack.techskills.academy) - a self-hosted social media publishing and automation platform - to every channel you list: Facebook, Instagram, YouTube and more, one API. No per-seat scheduler subscription, no third-party posting service in the middle.

### Setup
1. In PostStack create an API key (**Settings → API keys**) - it needs the channels/posts scopes (or leave scopes empty for full access). API access is a PostStack Pro feature.
2. Copy the channel ids you want to post to from **Channels** (or `GET /api/v1/channels`).
3. Fill in **Configuration (EDIT ME)**: PostStack URL, API key, comma-separated channel ids, topic feed URL, your brand voice and a fallback image URL (most platforms require media, so every post ships with an image).
4. Connect your OpenAI account on the **Write the Post** node.
5. Adjust the **Daily Trigger** schedule to taste and activate.

### Customization tips
Swap the feed for your niche's RSS, an X trends scraper or a Google Sheet of ideas. Edit the system prompt in **Write the Post** to nail your voice. Want unique images per post? Chain an image-generation node before **Build Posts per Channel** and map its URL into `imageUrl`.

## Pick a Topic
Runs on a schedule, reads the trends feed and picks the top topic of the day.

## Write with AI
OpenAI drafts a caption + hashtags in your brand voice, returned as strict JSON.

## Publish via PostStack
Resolves your channels, creates one post per channel and publishes each - all through the PostStack REST API.

nodes.name: Daily Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs once a day at 09:00. Adjust to your posting rhythm.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)

assignments.name: brandVoice
assignments.value: You write for a practical, no-hype tech brand. Short sentences. Concrete takeaways. One emoji max.

nodes.notes: channelIds: comma-separated ids from PostStack -> Channels. imageUrl: fallback image - most platforms require media on a post.

nodes.name: Pick a Topic
nodes.notes: Takes the top feed item. Swap for a random pick or a loop over the top N.

nodes.name: Write the Post

values.content: ={{ 'You are a social media copywriter. ' + $('Configuration (EDIT ME)').item.json.brandVoice + ' Reply with STRICT JSON only, no markdown fences: {"caption": "post text, max 500 chars, no hashtags inside", "hashtags": "#three #relevant #tags"}' }}

=Write a social media post about this trending topic: {{ $json.topic }}

Context: {{ $json.context }}

nodes.notes: Connect your OpenAI credentials here. Any chat model works - swap modelId to taste.

nodes.name: Build Posts per Channel
nodes.notes: One output item per target channel, with the platform resolved from the PostStack API.

nodes.name: Prepare Publish
nodes.notes: Pairs each created post with its target channel. URLs built here - n8n template validation dislikes multi-part expressions in URL fields.

nodes.name: Publish Now
nodes.notes: Change when to an ISO timestamp to schedule instead of publishing immediately. Pair with the post-alerts workflow to get notified about the outcome.
